title: Targeting brain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Targeting brains''' were used aboard [[Yuuzhan Vong]] starships to target weapons.

==Characteristics==
Around the size of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] fist, they were contained in a nut-like shell and immersed in a salty nutrient broth that smelled like rotting seaweed. A targeting brain could be 'reprogrammed' by surgically altering its nerve paths.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
